page_content: MATH436 Differential Geometry of Curves and Surfaces I MATH462 Partial Differential Equations MATH/AMSC/STAT Courses Select eight courses of 400-level or higher; must include: 2 MATH410 Advanced Calculus I Select one of the following: MATH401 Applications of Linear Algebra MATH403 Introduction to Abstract Algebra MATH405 Linear Algebra MATH423 Linear Optimization Select one of the following: AMSC460 Computational Methods AMSC466 Introduction to Numerical Analysis I Any 400-level STAT course other than STAT464 Select depth requirement; a one year sequence chosen from the following: MATH410 Advanced Calculus I & MATH411 and Advanced Calculus II MATH410 Advanced Calculus I & MATH463 and Complex Variables MATH403 Introduction to Abstract Algebra & MATH404 and Field Theory MATH403 Introduction to Abstract Algebra & MATH405 and Linear Algebra STAT410 Introduction to Probability Theory & STAT420 and Theory and Methods of Statistics Select electives: 400-level MATH/AMSC/STAT course 3, 4 Computer Programming Requirement Select one of the following: CMSC106 Introduction to C Programming CMSC131 Object-Oriented Programming I CMSC132 Object-Oriented Programming II ENAE202 Computing Fundamentals for Engineers ENEE150 Intermediate Programming Concepts for Engineers PHYS265 Introduction to Scientiﬁc Programming 3 3 3 3 3-6 6-9 3-4
